text.title: Problem Validation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid spec artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is a plural pronoun / generic group; inputs_used empty; sections empty; required fields missing.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is a plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`, `everyone`, `engineering`) or empty string
